reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

reviews.text: These are not loud at all. I can barely hear what I'm playing through them in bed, at the gym it's impossible to make anything out. You'd figure that spending this much on ear buds would mean they'd be good, high quality ear buds, but that simply is not the case.

reviews.title: but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers
reviews.text:
Time has passed since I returned them, so I don't remember exactly all the details, but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers, my main left and right speakers in my home theater are Klipsch. Excellent. But these in-ear headphones sounded bad. No low end, mid-rangy. Only manually pushing them I could get a better sound, but always too much towards the mids and mid-high frequencies.
I had higher expectations with them, knowing the brand. I thought they could be headphones I would like and trust to listen to music, and also being able to do exercises. I'm not 100% sure now, but I think I remember I couldn't keep them on while running and sweating.

reviews.title: Great Sound With Comfort And Stability
reviews.text:
This is an excellent set of Sports headphones that sounds great and stays put when you're getting your workout in. The headphones use a dual magnet, dynamic moving coil micro speaker to deliver a frequency response of 10HZ to 19kHz making them more than adequate for listening outside of the gym as well. While these headphones work with any device they are truly made for the Apple line of products (iPhone, iPad, iPod) as the control box gives you control over the volume, skip tracks and even take calls.

►► SOUND QUALITY ◄◄

The sound across the board is excellent from the low-end through the mid-range and high-end. They are not as open and airy as my Ultimate Ears TripleFi 10's, a set that listed for $399 retail, but they don't feel muted at all when listening to them.

Testing through a variety of music genres it would seem that these are tuned for the louder, upbeat music that you'd listen to while working out which makes sense since these are Sports headphones. With that said if I would have no problem listening to acoustic music through these as they product a nicely balanced, clean sound that is better than a lot of wired headsets I've tried. They are way better than the headphones included with my iPhone.

►► COMFORT ◄◄

For me comfort is just as important as sound quality because if your in-ear monitors aren't comfortable you won't want to wear them for extended periods of time. This set does a couple things right in the comfort arena with the design of the oval earbuds and the over the ear wire design that keeps the headphones in place and makes them feel as close to weightless as you can get.

I was a bit skeptical of the oval design of the earbuds as I am very used to the circular design and have been very happy with the Comply tips that I normally use. With that said the oval design here truly does seem to make a difference in the comfort of these tips as the included tips are more comfortable than most, if not all, of the standard tips I've had included in a set of headphones.

►► CONTROLS ◄◄

There is a small control box attached to the clip that you can use to keep the cord in place. The control box is very similar to those on other sets of headphones I have tested and it worked pretty much as expected except for the way you move up and down in the track list.

The top button on the control box is used to raise the volume on your device.

The bottom button on the control box is used to lower the volume on your device.

The center button is the most versatile as a quick click will play or pause your music or answer a call if the phone is ringing. A double tap of the center button will move to the next track in your track listing and a triple tap of the center button will move to the previous track. Pressing and holding the center button for a second will initiate Siri. While I am used to the volume buttons normally doubling up as the previous / next track control once I was used to this system it was a breeze to use.

►► PHONE CALLS ◄◄

The headset does a nice job with calls due to the fact that the microphone is nice and clear so there is no worries about taking a call while wearing these headphones.

►► CONCLUSION ◄◄

Overall this is an excellent set of Sports headphones that are both comfortable and sound great. They stay firmly in place and seem to be built to handle whatever wear and tear you will throw at them while working out. I love having full control over my iPhone with the included control. For me this is about as close to perfect as you can come with a Sports set of headphones. Highly recommended.

Sample provided for review.

reviews.title: Just right for me.
reviews.text: Diggin' these just fine. I can see how maybe people with tiny ears, or oddly shaped ears, might not have the right fit. Also, the portion in-ear is quite tiny, so there's not a huge amount of bass, but I still like the clarity, and there's enough adjustability to tailor the sound, even on my tiny Sandisc Mp3 player. What I like the most though, is the over the ear design, and I can have the wires feed out back out of my way. The portion in-ear, with the smallish oval tips, also makes me quite happy. So small, and un-noticeable, and comfortable, and they stay put till the end of my hike, or run, or skate, or whatever. The ones that came with the player sounded good too, but really annoying and would fall out when you get sweaty or turn your head. And I just didn't have a bunch of the new-style design to try out, with the horn on them that you rotate and lock into the ear. I read that those kind still fall out when sweaty and slippery anyway. (or you don't get the right fit). All problems solved with these sporty little guys. And Klipsch speakers and equipment have always impressed, so I'm glad I trusted my instincts...

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

title: Skullcandy Grind True Wireless In-Ear Bluetooth Earbuds Compatible with iPhone and Android / Charging Case and Microphone / Great for Gym, Sports, and Gaming, IP55 Water Dust Resistant - Grey/Blue
description: Meet the aptly named true wireless earbud for every part of your daily grind. Say hello to Grind™. Thanks to premium sound, hands-free voice control and a water/sweat-resistant build, these are truly your everyday, do-it-all earbuds. Features Skull-iQ Smart Voice Control technology to control audio, calls, Spotify Tap, and many other features hands-free (Compatible with smartphone devices on Android 10 or newer, and iOS 12 or newer)
features: Note : If the size of the earbud tips does not match the size of your ear canals or the headset is not worn properly in your ears, you may not obtain the correct sound qualities or call performance. Change the earbud tips to ones that fit more snugly in your ear

Supreme Sound - Relax, workout or run listening to your favorite tunes with crystal clear audio, gnarly bass and you'll be listening for up to 40 hours on a single charge. The case holds 31 hours, the buds hold 9 hours of battery
Skull-iQ Technology - Share your tunes with a friend in real time, activate your assistant, customize your earbud controls and trigger your phone camera to take the perfect selfie

Skull-iQ also offers complete hands free, meaning you never need to take off your gloves or let go of the handlebar. Play, pause, adjust volume, take calls, skip tracks, launch Spotify and activate Stay-Aware Mode, all without ever touching your device
Never lost with Tile - With Tile technology, Skullcandy tech makes it super easy to track down either earbud and keep your gadgets safe! Download the Tile app and follow the instructions to activate
Buy With Confidence - 1 Year warranty included with the Grind Fuel, whether you're an adult or child be sure to wear your earbuds in full confidence

reviews.title: Refurb- came coated with previous owner's ear wax - Yuck !  UPDATE !
reviews.text:
non hygenic refurb process disappoints- didn't try the super gross earbuds

UPDATE - I spent the extra $20 for a new set. these have issues. the earbuds turn on by themselves in the case and:
1.) hijack the phone connection
2.) use up all the battery, then charge up, and then run down the battery...so when you go to use the earbuds, the batteries are drained in earbuds and the case

other reviewers write of similar problem

skullcandy chat says they think the case needs to be replaced- I can send them in and wait a few weeks for their warranty repair. but it appears these issues are in the design

or return to amazon within the return period.

yes, that.

reviews.title: Nice sound
reviews.text: These have become my favorite earbuds love the voice activated commands

reviews.title: Stopped Charging
reviews.text: Stopped charging after a month. Return window just expired a few days ago. Now I have to deal with returning through Skullcandy

reviews.title: Comfort!
reviews.text: So the sound quality is good, battery life is good but for me the most important point is they are comfortable. I've been through a LOT of ear buds in search of something that I can wear for several hours without my ears starting to hurt and these are them! Charging case doesn't feel very substantial, but since I don't need to charge them every couple of hours I can live with it.

reviews.title: Interesting app
reviews.text: I've been using these earbuds for several weeks now, and they're as good as any pair I have. And I have several. They connect without issue and have good, clear sound. If you're looking for the intricasies of fine tuning, how good is the base and all that, I'm not the gal for you. However, I think music sounds great, and they're perfect for listening to YouTube vids on my computer and audio books on my phone. The app is interesting. At first I thought I could talk directly to my buds. "Hey, Skullcandy!" (First earbuds I've had with voice control.) But you have to use the app for that feature. Not quite as convenient in my opinion, although perhaps I was expecting too much. The controls are not touch, but require clicking on the individual buds to control them. You can also control them through the app, though. Instructions are clear and easy to understand. I was up and running in minutes. All in all, I think they are excellent and definitely worth the price tag.

title: Matekxy 2022 AirPods Pro 2nd Generation Case with Silicone Lanyard, Full Protection Shockproof and Dustproof Portable Cover with Keychain, Support Apple AirPods Wireless Charging - Red
description:
Matekxy AirPods Pro 2nd silicone case is designed for the new 2022 AirPods Pro 2nd only.
The AirPods Pro 2nd Case Cover is a one-piece design, with the top cover connected to the cover.
It fits tightly with the AirPods Pro 2nd and will not come off as easily.
After putting the protective cover on the headset, the LED light is visible so you can know if the case is charging or if it is fully charged.
There is also a small flag at the bottom to be able to cover the charging port. Covering the small flag when not charging will effectively prevent dust from entering.
In addition, you can hang it outside your backpack or on your hand with the configured keychain and lanyard, very convenient to carry.
What you'll get:
AirPods Pro 2nd Silicone Case
Silicone Lanyard
Black Keychain
features: Match Model: Matekxy simple, sophisticated and stylish AirPods case will accurately match the AirPods Pro 2 released in 2022. Good-looking, easy to use, and able to protect the headphones in all aspects.

Upgraded Shockproof Silicone Material: Light-weight Airpods Pro 2nd generation case skin case is made of soft-touch durable silicone material, completly protecting against fingerprint, scratches, bumps, anti-shock and anti-slip.
Convenient Charging: Front LED visible design and the bottom opening lightning charging design makes charging easier, support wire and wireless charging (But Not For Apple Watch Charger).

Portable Design: Portable travel designed Airpods Pro 2 case cover with carabiner Silicone Lanyard and Keychain. The removable rope and keychain are easy to attach to key ring, belt or computer bag which makes it convenient and secure to carry your Airpods Pro 2 anywhere.
Package Include: 1 * case for Airpods Pro 2nd generation 2022, 1 * Metal Buckle, 1 * Silicone Lanyard

title: FXWONTY Wireless Headset, Bluetooth Headset with AI Noise Cancelling Microphone & Charging Base, 50Hrs Bluetooth 5.0 Headphones with USB for PC/Remote Work/Call Center/Online Class/Trucker/Zoom/Skype
features: [AI NOISE CANCELLATION & MUTE FUNCTION]FXWONTY wireless headset for computer Qualcomm chip QCC3020 equipped with AI environmental noise cancelation microphone, it can eliminate up to 99.99% of the ambient noise. So you can hear and be heard clearly wherever you are. It's perfect for remote work. When you want to mute your voice during the call, just pressing the mute button on the microphone, ensuring that you can easily switch to a private conversation.

[LONG BATTERY LIFE & CONVENIENT CHARGING BASE]The bluetooth headset is equipped with a 400mAh battery that provides up to 50 hours of talk time and 400 hours of standby time.It's perfect for office, home, remote working, call center. Wireless headset for computer designed with a charging base, you can easily drop the headset in it for a charge, the headset can also be charged with the USB-C charging cable directly. It only takes 2 hours to fully charge.

[BLUETOOTH HEADSET WITH USB DONGLE & WIDE COMPATIBILITY]Wireless headset adopts bluetooth 5.0. The pairing process is fast, efficient and stable.The bluetooth headset with microphone can work for computers, cell phones, laptop, pc tablets& any bluetooth devices. It will also come with the USB dongle, so you don't need to worry about the compatibility issue any more. For devices without Bluetooth function, you can use our USB dongle to connect.

[COMFORTABLE EARMUFFS & ROTATABLE MICROPHONE]The USB wireless headset with microphone is comfortable to wear, with soft& breathable earmuffs& adjustable headband design to fit different head types. In addition, the rotatable microphone can be used on the right or left. The single ear wireless headset is suitable for call center, remote work, office, home, classroom, online courses, receptionist, construction sites, teams, zoom, skype and other life needs.

[REMOTE WORKING RANGE & HANDS-FREE CALLS]The bluetooth 5.0 headset for pc has a wireless working range of up to 49 feet/15 meters, even a distance away from the connected device for a short time, call quality will not be affected. Hands-free function: click MFB to answer / hang up the cell phone (only for mobile phones); If you have any problem of the product, pls free to contact us, the customer service team will provide you with quality solutions.

reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)
